---
bibliography: ../../../referencias/referencias.bib
csl: https://www.zotero.org/styles/apa
format: 
 pdf: 
   papersize: letter
   documentclass: article
   lang: es-CR
   titlepage: true
   toc: true
   toc-title: "Índice"
   toccolor: "black"
   fontsize: "11pt"
   mainfont: Times New Roman
   urlcolor: "blue"
   number-sections: true
   margin-left: "2.54cm"
   margin-right: "2.54cm"
   margin-top: "2.54cm"
   margin-bottom: "2.54cm"
   header-includes:
            - \usepackage{indentfirst}
            - \setlength{\parindent}{1.27cm} 
   include-before-body: Portada.tex
---

```{=latex}
\setcounter{page}{1} 
```

\newpage
